arts.ttl: Antonin Kinsky already making Tottenham history as Ange Postecoglou hails impact
arts.sum: Antonin Kinsky arrived at Tottenham in a £12.5m move from Slavia Prague last week and has kept two clean sheets, the first goalkeeper at the club to do that in a century

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta discloses Jack Wilshere's key role in Arsenal's approach to North London Derby
arts.sum: Jack Wilshere played a key role in forming Mikel Arteta's attitude to North London derbies, one which he has now passed to his players as they prepare to face Tottenham on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes Kai Havertz stance clear and sends message to trolls targeting Arsenal star
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has backed Kai Havertz to return from his difficult FA Cup outing on Sunday and was quick to remind Arsenal fans of his match winning antics only weeks ago

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou: Dominic Solanke has exceeded expectations – with more to come
arts.sum: Solanke has scored 11 times and provided six assists for Tottenham since a £65million summer switch.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta demands ‘best atmosphere ever’ at Arsenal for north London derby
arts.sum: The Gunners will welcome their arch-rivals Tottenham to the Emirates off the back of two consecutive home defeats

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals how Gabriel Jesus' ACL injury could impact Arsenal's transfer window with the Brazil star set for several months out
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: The 27-year-old went off on a stretcher in the first half of Arsenal's FA Cup third-round penalty shoutout defeat to Manchester United on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Martin Zubimendi transfer set to see two Gunners stars pushed towards exit door
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly closing in on a deal for Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi and two further deals could be unlocked once he arrives at the Emirates Stadium

arts.ttl: Tottenham takeover rumours resurface after Daniel Levy holds in-person talks with Qatari powerbroker
Mikel Arteta future: Arsenal sack verdict delivered as Spaniard risks Arsene Wenger-esque "collapse"
arts.sum: Arsenal expert Charles Watts can understand why the "spotlight is shining" on Mikel Arteta but insists that it is "far too early" to talk about a possible sacking.

arts.ttl: We 'signed' Viktor Gyokeres for Arsenal and the striker added much-needed goals
arts.sum: Another injury in attack could finally tempt Arsenal into signing a new striker, with Sporting Lisbon's Viktor Gyokeres being linked with a move to the Emirates. A striker has been on Arsenal's wishlist for some time now, and with Gabriel Jesus joining the Gunners' injury list in the FA Cup defeat against Manchester United, the Gunners may look to add some depth in attack this January rather than waiting until the summer.
